basic_details.job_title: Gujarat Vidyapith Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Vidyapith has released the official Finance Officer Notification 2026 on 24 April 2026 at https://gujaratvidyapith.org. Eligible candidates aged preferably below 57 years with a qualification of Master’s Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade along with relevant academic/administrative experience can apply online from 24 April 2026 to 23 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade, or comparable experience in research establishment/higher education, or 15 years of administrative experience (8 years as Deputy Registrar or equivalent). Desirable: MBA Finance/M.Com/CA or ICWA.
qualification.details: Master's Degree with at least 55% of the marks or equivalent grade in a point scale wherever grading system is followed. At least 15 years of experience as Assistant Professor in the Academic Level 11 and above or with 08 years of service in Academic Level 12 and above including as Associate Professor along with experience in educational administration. Comparable experience in research establishment and/or other institutions of higher education. 15 years of administrative experience, of which 08 years shall be as Deputy Registrar or an equivalent post.

selection_process: Online Application Submission of hardcopy Document Verification/Eligibility Process Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Gujarat Vidyapith Finance Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gujarat Vidyapith to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat Vidyapith Finance Officer Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Finance Officer post is 23 May 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Finance Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent grade. Additionally, relevant experience in educational administration or research is required, as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Finance Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Finance Officer post will receive a salary in Pay Matrix Level 14, ranging from Rs. 1,44,200 to Rs. 2,18,200 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for Gujarat Vidyapith Finance Officer Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies by category. General/OBC/EWS candidates need to pay Rs. 1200, while SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 1000. PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The preferred age limit for candidates applying for the Finance Officer position is below 57 years. Specific age relaxation details are usually provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Gujarat Vidyapith Finance Officer Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an online application, submission of hardcopy, document verification, eligibility assessment, and a final interview.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Gujarat. However, it's best to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Is the Finance Officer post a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, the job type for the Finance Officer position is listed as 'Contract'.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of Gujarat Vidyapith.
